hooks.command: f="$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' <<<"$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT")"; case "$f" in */understudy/models.py) exit 0 ;; esac; c="$(jq -r '[.tool_input.new_string, .tool_input.content, (.tool_input.edits // [] | map(.new_string))] | flatten | map(select(. != null)) | join("\n")' <<<"$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT")"; if printf '%s' "$c" | grep -Eq 'gemini-3(\.1)?-(flash|pro|flash-lite)'; then echo "blocked: gemini-3* model IDs must only live in understudy/models.py (CLAUDE.md invariant). File: $f" >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0
f="$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' <<<"$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT")"; case "$f" in *.py) ruff format "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1 && ruff check --fix --quiet "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1 ;; esac; exit 0
f="$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' <<<"$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT")"; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx) (cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/apps/web" && npx --no-install tsc --noEmit) >/dev/null 2>&1 ;; esac; exit 0
